author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Dark Summoner to Dekiteiru' Reveals Main Cast, Staff, Fall 2026 Debut
WWWaveCorporation's Deregula animation label opened an official website for the television anime adaptation of Shaoh's Dark Summoner to Dekiteiru (I'm Dating a Dark Summoner) web manga on Friday, revealing the main cast, production staff, and a key visual (pictured). The anime series is scheduled to premiere in October 2026. Cast Amona: Rei Takano Roni: Yuuki Nishiyama Imp: Houdentei Senmai Staff Director, Series Composition, Script: Seiya Miyajima (Umayon) Character Design, Chief...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Ibitte Konai Gibo to Gishi' Reveals Additional Cast, Theme Songs, First Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Otsuji's Ibitte Konai Gibo to Gishi (My Stepmother and Stepsisters Aren't Wicked) manga revealed three additional cast members, the theme songs, and first promotional video on Friday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere on July 8 at 11:30 p.m. on Television Kanagawa, TeleTama, and Chiba TV, followed by MBS, Tokyo MX, and BS Asahi. Cast Yaeko Kounokura: Miyari Nemoto (Ruri no Houseki) Nago: Yumi Uchiyama (Mahouka Koukou...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Kekkaishi no Ichirinka' Reveals Main Cast, Additional Staff, Teaser Promo for Winter 2027
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Kureha's Kekkaishi no Ichirinka (Bride of the Barrier Master) novel revealed the main cast, additional staff, a second teaser visual (pictured), and teaser promotional video on Friday. The anime series will premiere in January 2027. Voice actors Akari Kitou (Ao no Hako) and Kikunosuke Toya (Chainsaw Man) are starring as Hana Ichise and Saku Ichinomiya, respectively. Yukari Hashimoto (Komi-san wa, Comyushou desu.), Ruka Kawada (Toum...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Super no Ura de Yani Suu Futari' Reveals Additional Staff, Second Promo
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Jinushi's Super no Ura de Yani Suu Futari (Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You) manga revealed addition staff and a second promotional video on Thursday. The first six episodes were streamed as 12 mini-episodes on Abema on June 3, and regular broadcasting is scheduled to begin on July 9 on TBS, followed by AT-X. Staff Prop Design: Mahiru Shinya (Rikei ga Koi ni Ochita no de Shoumei Shite Mita.) Art Director: Masaru Toya (Seishu...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Cyborg 009: Nemesis' Announces Additional Cast
The official website of the Cyborg 009: Nemesis anime series revealed additional cast and a new character visual (pictured right) on Friday. The anime adapting Shoutarou Ishinomori's action sci-fi manga will begin streaming in Summer 2026. Cast Pyunma/008: Yuu Hayashi (Tokyo Revengers) Great Britain/007: Kentarou Tone (Utawarerumono: Itsuwari no Kamen) Chang Changku/006: Mitsuaki Kanuka (Kusuriya no Hitorigoto) Geronimo Jr./005: Hiroki Yasumoto (One Punch Man) Albert Heinrich/004: Tomokazu...
